---
title: "Data Visualization"
format: html
---

## Load packages

```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(janitor)

library(ggplot2)

library(plotly)
```

## Load the data

```{r}
delta_visits_raw <- read_csv('https://tinyurl.com/delta-activities')
```

## Explore the data

```{r}
colnames(delta_visits_raw)
glimpse(delta_visits_raw)
```

## Clean up the data

```{r}
delta_visits <- delta_visits_raw %>% 
    clean_names()
delta_visits
```

```{r}
visits_long <- delta_visits %>% 
    pivot_longer(
        col = c(sm_boat, med_boat, lrg_boat, bank_angler, scientist, cars),
        names_to = 'visitor_type',
        values_to = 'quantity'
    ) %>% 
        rename(restore_loc = eco_restore_approximate_location) %>% 
        select(-notes)
glimpse(visits_long)
```


```{r}
daily_visits_loc <- visits_long %>% 
    group_by(restore_loc, date, visitor_type) %>% 
    summarize(daily_visits = sum(quantity), .groups = 'drop')
```

## Make some plots


```{r}
ggplot(daily_visits_loc, 
    aes(x = restore_loc, y = daily_visits)) + 
        geom_col()
```
